description: One row per attachment / artifact on a case (image, video, instruction, .eml, valuation, eva_payload, other). Mirrors collisioncc image-rules. Bytes are stored in a File column / Azure Blob and referenced by storagePath -- NEVER inlined in the row (graph-intake invariant: all file data uploaded to storage immediately).

lifecycle.note: One of the four M1-live tables.

primaryColumn.description: Display name, e.g. IMG_0421.jpg or Instruction.pdf.

columns.description: overview|damage_closeup|additional|unknown. Default unknown; MANUAL until M2 image AI.
OCR-assisted from M1: does the image's OCR text contain the case VRM? Read-only-from-data in the Code App (set by parser/OCR Function).
Has this artifact been accepted into the EVA upload set? Default true.
Flagged unusable (e.g. a person's reflection is visible). Auto-detection is M2; manual in M1.
Photo order within the EVA upload set. EVA order = 2 previews (overview + main-damage closeup) first, then ALL photos in sequence INCLUDING those two again.
SHA256 of the bytes. Dedup key within a message (no duplicate IDs).
Byte size of the stored artifact.
Reference to the bytes in the File column / Azure Blob container. NEVER inline bytes in the row.
Optional Dataverse File column alternative to an external Blob (Phase-1 Risk #4: file-column vs Blob choice to be confirmed). Holds bytes off-row either way.
Graph / Internet Message-ID the artifact arrived on (links Evidence back to its intake message).
Where it came from (message / upload label) for the UI.
BOX ONE-WAY MIRROR (Phase 7, ADR-0012). The Box file id from upload for this artifact; supersedes the box:file id-in-sourcemessageid hack. Webhook/lifecycle correlation. Written Dataverse->Box only.
BOX ONE-WAY MIRROR (Phase 7). The per-file Box shared-link URL (GetSharedLink access=open) surfaced as the direct 'open in Box' link on the evidence row. format:Url. Written Dataverse->Box only.

notes: Bytes live off-row (Blob/File column) referenced by storagePath; no inline-bytes write path may exist.
registrationVisible is OCR-set from M1; imageRole stays manual until M2.

Box one-way mirror (Phase 7, ADR-0012): cr1bd_boxfileid / cr1bd_boxfileurl are written Dataverse->Box only (per-file shared links surfaced in the Evidence tab); never read back to drive dedup/status/sequencing.
